storyboard.content: My entire right side suddenly became weak about an hour ago
This came on all of a sudden about one hour ago and has not improved
My right arm and right leg feel very heavy and I can barely move them
My speech has become slurred and I am having trouble finding the right words
I have a very severe headache that came on out of nowhere
I cannot move my right arm and leg properly and I cannot speak clearly. This is unlike anything I have ever felt
I'm a 61-year-old man with high blood pressure and I take blood pressure medication. I have never had anything like this before
